arts.ttl: Alexander Isak's scoring run in Premier League ends at 8 games. Jamie Vardy's record safe for now
arts.sum: The Sweden international had scored in eight straight games before failing to find the net in Newcastle’s 4-1 loss to Bournemouth on Saturday. Ruud van Nistelrooy (Manchester United), March-August 2003

arts.ttl: Leicester City team news v Fulham with one change made and Woyo Coulibaly missing
arts.sum: Harry Winks and Boubakary Soumare start in midfield, with Stephy Mavididi and Bilal El Khannouss joining Ayew in supporting Vardy. City (4-2-3-1): Stolarczyk; Justin, Faes, Vestergaard, Kristiansen; Winks, Soumare; Ayew, El Khannouss, Mavididi; Vardy.

arts.ttl: Brentford v Liverpool, Leicester v Fulham, West Ham v Crystal Palace: football – live
arts.sum: Live updates from the 3pm GMT kick-offs and beyond Live scoreboard | Latest table | And you can mail Scott The early games in the Championship have finished. A big win for Cardiff in the South Wales derby. An equally precious victory for Hull in south London. Both teams put some distance between themselves and bottom club Plymouth, who haven’t had a good day at all. Cardiff City 3-0 Swansea City Millwall 0-1 Hull City Plymouth Argyle 0-1 Queens Park Rangers Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Leicester City transfer state of play as potential exits open door for new signings
arts.sum: Van Nistelrooy has spoken of needing to cover for injuries in the squad, and has said Coulibaly helps in that regard, with Ricardo Pereira out for at least another couple of months. Leicester City need to create space in their squad and build up a pot of cash to help bring in further January signings.

arts.ttl: 'Fed up' Ruud van Nistelrooy makes Leicester City relegation fight prediction
arts.sum: Performances have been encouraging, but results have not followed and Van Nistelrooy knows the situation is serious. “That makes the situation possible, but it is up to us to start collecting points.

arts.ttl: Leicester vs Fulham: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Leicester host Fulham in the Premier League on Saturday. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and more.

arts.ttl: FA Cup: Chelsea, Man Utd, Liverpool and Tottenham new dates revealed as fourth round TV schedule is announced
arts.sum: Some intriguing ties will take place in the fourth round of the FA Cup

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy concerns me - Man Utd icon looks set to take Leicester down
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy has seen Leicester fall to six successive defeats in the Premier League, with the Foxes now sitting second bottom of the top-flight table as they battle against the drop

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy details plan to get Leicester back on track after horror run
arts.sum: Leicester City have lost six-in-a-row and an air of resignation has set in amongst fans at the King Power Stadium that last season's Championship winners may be returning to the second tier - but Ruud van Nistelrooy sees it differently

arts.ttl: Premier League: Predictions for all ten of this weekend's games
arts.sum: Aaron Ashley has picked out a score prediction for all 10 Premier League matches taking place on Saturday, Sunday and Monday.
